recommendations.title: Wrinkles
recommendations.overview: At an elder-care facility, a geriatric con artist tries to prevent his new friend with early Alzheimer's symptoms from being transferred to the 'lost causes' floor.

recommendations.title: Death's Roulette
recommendations.overview: Seven strangers wake up in a mansion in the middle of nowhere to discover they are part of a twisted game. They will have 60 minutes to choose one person to die; otherwise, all of them will be murdered. As the clock ticks down, the most lurid secrets

recommendations.title: The Lodge
recommendations.overview: When a father is forced to abruptly depart for work, he leaves his children, Aidan and Mia, at their holiday home in the care of his new girlfriend, Grace. Isolated and alone, a blizzard traps them inside the lodge as terrifying events summon specter

recommendations.title: I Am the Pretty Thing That Lives in the House
recommendations.overview: A young nurse takes care of an elderly author who lives in a haunted house.

recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatric intern unearths secrets about the mental health facility in which he works.

recommendations.title: Mercy
recommendations.overview: A single mom and her two boys help take care of their grandmother with mystical powers.

recommendations.title: The Night
recommendations.overview: An Iranian couple living in the US become trapped inside a hotel when insidious events force them to face the secrets that have come between them, in a night that never ends.

recommendations.title: Cropsey
recommendations.overview: Realizing the urban legend of their youth has actually come true, two filmmakers delve into the mystery surrounding five missing children and the real-life boogeyman linked to their disappearances.

recommendations.title: The Eternal Daughter
recommendations.overview: An artist and her elderly mother confront long-buried secrets when they return to a former family home, now a hotel haunted by its mysterious past.

recommendations.title: The Owners
